name: Independent
description_short: Independent Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union based in Anderson, Indiana, offering checking, savings, loans, and financial wellness resources to its members.
description_long:
Independent Federal Credit Union (IFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution headquartered in Anderson, Indiana. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates under NCUA insurance and serves its membership with a focus on improving members' financial lives through accessible banking services.

IFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share accounts (checking and savings), share certificates, personal loans with competitive rates, and specialized loan products like their Spring Break Get-A-Way loans (rates as low as 7.00% APR). Members have access to mobile banking with mobile deposit capabilities, online bill pay, and Courtesy Pay overdraft protection. The credit union also provides access to nearly 5,000 surcharge-free ATMs through partnerships with Independent and Alliance One networks, plus shared branching through the CO-OP network across the country.

What distinguishes IFCU is their emphasis on member financial education and wellness. They offer free financial counseling through a partnership with GreenPath Financial Wellness (a 60+ year old nonprofit), provide access to Zogo—a free financial literacy app that pays users to learn about money—and distribute a free Money Basics Guide covering budgeting and savings. They also offer Loan Pay Xpress, allowing members to make loan payments from other financial institutions, and provide TruStage Insurance options for auto, home, life, and health coverage at member discounts.

As a credit union, IFCU operates on a not-for-profit model focused on member benefit rather than shareholder profit. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility requirements, specific account features, fee structures, or detailed loan terms beyond the single advertised rate. The emphasis on promotional loans and limited transparency about standard products may leave prospective members with incomplete information for decision-making.
services: Loan Pay Xpress third-party loan payment service
Free financial counseling via GreenPath partnership
pros: Access to nearly 5,000 surcharge-free ATMs through Independent and Alliance One partnership networks
Free financial counseling partnership with GreenPath Financial Wellness, a 60+ year nonprofit organization
Zogo financial literacy app that pays members to learn about personal finance topics
CO-OP Shared Branching network allowing transactions at participating credit unions nationwide
Mobile deposit functionality integrated into their mobile banking app for convenient check deposits
Courtesy Pay overdraft protection to help members avoid overdraft fees
Loan Pay Xpress service allowing members to make loan payments from other financial institutions
Competitive loan rates advertised (Spring Break loan rates as low as 7.00% APR)
cons: Limited transparency on membership eligibility requirements and how to join
Website provides minimal details on account types, fees, interest rates, or specific product terms beyond promotional offerings
No information about customer service phone numbers, hours, or support channels on the homepage
Unclear whether all advertised services (like shared branching and CO-OP ATM access) are available to all member tiers
Lack of details on savings account rates, CD terms, or other deposit products
best_for: Current and prospective members seeking comprehensive financial wellness support and free counseling
Consumers in the Anderson, Indiana area or those with membership eligibility who want surcharge-free ATM access
Members interested in free financial literacy education through gamified apps like Zogo
Individuals seeking a member-owned, not-for-profit alternative to traditional banks
diagnosis: Independent Federal Credit Union is best for members in or near Anderson, Indiana, or those with membership eligibility who prioritize member-owned financial institutions with strong financial wellness resources. The main caveat is limited website transparency—prospective members will need to contact the credit union directly to understand membership requirements, specific account features, fee structures, and full product offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Independent — Credit Union in ANDERSON, IN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Independent — NCUA-insured credit union in ANDERSON, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
